name: Deploy NIXL LIBFABRIC Plugin with Two-Sided Messaging
description: Deploy custom-built NIXL LIBFABRIC plugin (libplugin_LIBFABRIC.so) with Request/Response protocol implementation

tasks.name: Verify NIXL Installation
tasks.description: Check if NIXL is installed and find plugin directory
commands: python3 -c 'import nixl; print(f"[OK] NIXL installed: {nixl.__file__}")' || { echo '[ERROR] NIXL not installed'; exit 1; }
test -d "${PLUGIN_DIR}" || { echo '[ERROR] Plugin directory not found'; exit 1; }

tasks.name: Verify Source Plugin File
tasks.description: Check if source plugin file exists in /tmp
commands: test -f {{PLUGIN_SOURCE}} || { echo '[ERROR] Source plugin not found at {{PLUGIN_SOURCE}}'; exit 1; }

tasks.name: Backup Existing Plugin
tasks.description: Create backup of existing LIBFABRIC plugin if it exists
tasks.skip_if: NIXL_DIR=$(python3 -c 'import nixl; import os; print(os.path.dirname(nixl.__file__))'); PLUGIN_DIR="${NIXL_DIR}/_lib"; ! test -f "${PLUGIN_DIR}/{{PLUGIN_NAME}}"

tasks.name: Deploy New Plugin
tasks.description: Copy new LIBFABRIC plugin to NIXL directory

tasks.name: Verify Plugin Symbols
tasks.description: Check if plugin has required symbols (nixl_init, nixl_cleanup, etc.)
commands: nm -D "${PLUGIN_DIR}/{{PLUGIN_NAME}}" | grep -E '(nixl_init|nixl_cleanup|nixl_connect|nixl_put|nixl_get)' >/dev/null && echo '[OK] Required symbols found' || { echo '[ERROR] Required symbols not found'; exit 1; }

tasks.name: Verify Libfabric Dependencies
tasks.description: Check if plugin links to libfabric correctly
commands: ldd "${PLUGIN_DIR}/{{PLUGIN_NAME}}" | grep libfabric && echo '[OK] Libfabric linked' || { echo '[WARN] Libfabric not linked (may be OK if static)'; }

tasks.name: Test Plugin Load
tasks.description: Attempt to load LIBFABRIC backend using Python
commands: python3 -c 'import nixl; import os; nixl_dir = os.path.dirname(nixl.__file__); print(f"[INFO] NIXL dir: {nixl_dir}")' || { echo '[ERROR] Failed to import nixl'; exit 1; }
echo '[INFO] To test LIBFABRIC backend initialization, run a minimal example with backend=["LIBFABRIC"]'
